title: The Best Pens for Autograph Signings
description: Pen type determines whether a signature still looks crisp in twenty years or fades into nothing. A surface-by-surface guide to archival pen choices for every type of signed item.

title: How to Safely Store Your Autographed Photos
description: Sleeves, toploaders, humidity boxes, and the environmental basics that do the most quiet damage — a practical guide to keeping signed photos safe for decades.
